# Requirement: CR-001

- Title: Contract change approval workflow
- Status: Active

## Requirement Statement

The system shall enforce explicit approval (via Interface Change Request) for all breaking schema/interface contract changes, with migration notes and traceability to backlog and requirements artifacts.

## Rationale

Unreviewed breaking contract changes can invalidate content, routes, and future integrations. Controlled evolution requires an explicit approval gate.

## Acceptance Conditions

- A documented ICR is linked for every breaking contract change.
- Migration notes are attached in PR when compatibility is impacted.
- Reviewers can trace contract decisions to backlog and requirements artifacts.

## Success Metrics

- 0 unapproved breaking contract changes merged to main.

## Non-Goals

- Automated semantic diff tooling for all contract types in Phase 1.

## Constraints

- Must follow governance defined in project and generic instructions.
